title.rendered: Getting Started with Prowler Web-UI for Developers

content.rendered: Join Prowler CEO and Founder Toni de la Fuente and Prowler Engineer Pablo Lara for an in-depth look at the new Prowler Web-UI. In this 60-minute webinar, you’ll learn how to quickly set up the interface, leverage its key features, and streamline your security checks—complete with practical demos and best practices tailored for developers. Don’t miss this chance to get started with Prowler’s Web-UI and enhance your cloud security posture.
